testcase.name: TC_010_verifyResponseSchemaConsistency

failure.message:
1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: The content to match the given JSON schema. error: ECMA 262 regex "^X{6}\d{4}$" does not match input string "XXXXXXXX6761" level: "error" schema: {"loadingURI":"file:/C:/Users/piyus/IdeaProjects/RestAssuredLearning/target/test-classes/qrverification/aadhaar-qr-verify-any-schema.json#","pointer":"/properties/qr_data/properties/masked_aadhaar"} instance: {"pointer":"/qr_data/masked_aadhaar"} domain: "validation" keyword: "pattern" regex: "^X{6}\\d{4}$" string: "XXXXXXXX6761"
Actual: {"success":true,"verification_status":"verified","verification_type":"aadhaar_any","name":"Piyush Kumar","gender":"Male","dob":"2003-09-12","care_of":"C/O: Shambhu Kumar Singh","aadhaar_last4":"6761","reference_id":"XXXXXXXX6761","photo_available":false,"address":{"house":"","street":"","landmark":"village rasalpur near mahadev mandir, ward no. 03","location":"thana chakand","vtc":"Rasalpur","district":"Gaya","sub_district":"Gaya","state":"Bihar","pin_code":"823003","post_office":"Buniyad Ganj"},"qr_data":{"reference_id":"676120250312171555049","version":"V4","email_mobile_indicator":"3","name":"Piyush Kumar","dob":"2003-09-12","gender":"Male","care_of":"C/O: Shambhu Kumar Singh","district":"Gaya","landmark":"village rasalpur near mahadev mandir, ward no. 03","house":"","location":"thana chakand","pin_code":"823003","post_office":"Buniyad Ganj","state":"Bihar","street":"","sub_district":"Gaya","vtc":"Rasalpur","masked_aadhaar":"XXXXXXXX6761"},"metadata":{"trust_level":"cryptographic_qr","qr_format":"uidai_secure_qr","signature_verified":true,"signature_verification_available":true,"pdf_signature_present":false,"pdf_signature_verified":false,"pdf_signature_summary":"","ocr_used":false,"ocr_available":true}}

testcase.name: TC_005_verifyPhotoAvailabilityFlag

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. JSON path photo_available doesn't match. Expected: <true> Actual: <false>

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. JSON path photo_available doesn't match. Expected: <true> Actual: <false>
at org.codehaus.groovy.vmplugin.v8.IndyInterface.fromCache(IndyInterface.java:344) at
